message:
refactor(ndarray,dtype): change sliding_window_view to take &[usize] instead of Vec<usize>; use f64::midpoint for complex sqrt

- Change NdLayout::sliding_window_view parameter from Vec<usize> to
  &[usize], avoiding an unnecessary allocation at every call site —
  all callers already have a slice or Vec they can borrow
- Update all callers in conformance suite and tests
- Replace manual (mag+r)/2 and (mag-r)/2 computations in complex sqrt
  with f64::midpoint(mag, r) and f64::midpoint(mag, -r) for better
  numerical stability near zero

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
